# isSeamless

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value indicating whether the noise map’s output can repeat seamlessly in all directions.

## Declaration

```swift
var isSeamless: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

This property is read-only; you choose whether a noise map tiles seamlessly when creating it with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoiseMap/interpolatedValue(at:)] initializer.

## Inspecting a Noise Map

- **size**: The size of the “slice” of noise samples contained in the noise map relative to the unit coordinate space of the noise object it was created from.
- **origin**: The position of the “slice” of noise samples contained in the noise map relative to the unit coordinate space of the noise object it was created from.
- **sampleCount**: The width and height of integer grid for which the noise map contains sampled noise values.
